name: Paracetamol
sideEffects: Nausea, liver damage (overdose), rash, allergic reactions

name: Ibuprofen
sideEffects: Gastric irritation, nausea, dizziness, renal impairment, GI bleeding

name: Diclofenac Sodium
sideEffects: Gastric ulcer, nausea, headache, elevated liver enzymes, cardiovascular risk

name: Naproxen Sodium
sideEffects: GI upset, nausea, dizziness, headache, edema

name: Meloxicam
sideEffects: GI disturbance, headache, dizziness, edema

name: Amoxicillin
sideEffects: Diarrhea, nausea, skin rash, allergic reactions, candidiasis

name: Amoxicillin + Clavulanic Acid
sideEffects: Diarrhea, nausea, vomiting, skin rash, hepatotoxicity

name: Cefixime
sideEffects: Diarrhea, abdominal pain, nausea, headache, rash

name: Ceftriaxone
sideEffects: Diarrhea, injection site reaction, rash, elevated liver enzymes

name: Azithromycin
sideEffects: Nausea, diarrhea, abdominal pain, headache, QT prolongation
typicalDosage: 500mg on day 1, then 250mg daily for 4 days

name: Ciprofloxacin
sideEffects: Nausea, diarrhea, dizziness, tendon damage, photosensitivity

name: Levofloxacin
sideEffects: Nausea, diarrhea, headache, insomnia, tendon damage

name: Metronidazole
sideEffects: Nausea, metallic taste, disulfiram-like reaction with alcohol, peripheral neuropathy

name: Doxycycline
sideEffects: GI upset, photosensitivity, esophageal ulceration, teeth discoloration (children)
typicalDosage: 100mg every 12 hours on day 1, then 100mg daily

name: Amlodipine
sideEffects: Edema, headache, dizziness, flushing, fatigue

name: Telmisartan
sideEffects: Dizziness, back pain, diarrhea, hypotension, hyperkalemia

name: Losartan Potassium
sideEffects: Dizziness, hypotension, hyperkalemia, fatigue

name: Enalapril Maleate
sideEffects: Dry cough, dizziness, hypotension, hyperkalemia, angioedema

name: Metoprolol
sideEffects: Fatigue, bradycardia, dizziness, cold extremities, sexual dysfunction

name: Cilnidipine
sideEffects: Edema, headache, flushing, dizziness, tachycardia

name: Lisinopril
sideEffects: Dry cough, dizziness, hypotension, hyperkalemia, renal impairment

name: Metformin Hydrochloride
sideEffects: Nausea, diarrhea, abdominal discomfort, lactic acidosis (rare), vitamin B12 deficiency

name: Glimepiride
sideEffects: Hypoglycemia, weight gain, nausea, headache, rash

name: Gliclazide
sideEffects: Hypoglycemia, weight gain, GI upset, skin rash

name: Sitagliptin
sideEffects: Nasopharyngitis, headache, hypoglycemia (with other agents), pancreatitis (rare)

name: Voglibose
sideEffects: Flatulence, diarrhea, abdominal discomfort, hypoglycemia (with other agents)

name: Insulin Glargine
sideEffects: Hypoglycemia, injection site reactions, weight gain, lipodystrophy

name: Omeprazole
sideEffects: Headache, nausea, diarrhea, abdominal pain, vitamin B12 deficiency (long-term)

name: Pantoprazole
sideEffects: Headache, diarrhea, nausea, abdominal pain, dizziness

name: Rabeprazole
sideEffects: Headache, diarrhea, nausea, abdominal pain, myalgia

name: Esomeprazole
sideEffects: Headache, diarrhea, nausea, flatulence, abdominal pain

name: Cetirizine
sideEffects: Drowsiness, dry mouth, headache, fatigue, dizziness

name: Levocetirizine
sideEffects: Drowsiness, dry mouth, headache, fatigue

name: Fexofenadine
sideEffects: Headache, drowsiness, nausea, dizziness

name: Loratadine
sideEffects: Headache, drowsiness (rare), dry mouth, fatigue

name: Salbutamol
sideEffects: Tremor, tachycardia, headache, hypokalemia, palpitation

name: Montelukast
sideEffects: Headache, abdominal pain, mood changes, sleep disturbance

name: Atorvastatin
sideEffects: Myalgia, elevated liver enzymes, GI upset, headache, rhabdomyolysis (rare)

name: Rosuvastatin
sideEffects: Myalgia, elevated liver enzymes, headache, nausea, proteinuria

name: Ondansetron
sideEffects: Headache, constipation, dizziness, QT prolongation

name: Domperidone
sideEffects: Dry mouth, headache, diarrhea, QT prolongation, galactorrhea

name: Hyoscine Butylbromide
sideEffects: Dry mouth, blurred vision, urinary retention, tachycardia, constipation

name: Dexamethasone
sideEffects: Weight gain, hyperglycemia, osteoporosis, immunosuppression, GI upset

name: Prednisolone
sideEffects: Weight gain, hyperglycemia, osteoporosis, mood changes, GI upset

name: Fluoxetine
sideEffects: Nausea, insomnia, headache, anxiety, sexual dysfunction, weight loss

name: Diazepam
sideEffects: Drowsiness, dependence, ataxia, amnesia, respiratory depression

name: Alprazolam
sideEffects: Drowsiness, dependence, dizziness, memory impairment, withdrawal

name: Aciclovir
sideEffects: Nausea, headache, diarrhea, renal impairment (IV), rash

name: Oseltamivir
sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, headache, abdominal pain, neuropsychiatric events

name: Clopidogrel
sideEffects: Bleeding, bruising, diarrhea, rash, abdominal pain

name: Baclofen
sideEffects: Drowsiness, dizziness, weakness, confusion, hypotension

name: Tolperisone
sideEffects: Dizziness, headache, nausea, hypotension, weakness

name: Fluconazole
sideEffects: Nausea, headache, abdominal pain, elevated liver enzymes, rash

name: Albendazole
sideEffects: Abdominal pain, nausea, headache, dizziness, elevated liver enzymes
typicalDosage: 400mg single dose (roundworm); 400mg twice daily for 3 days (hookworm)

name: Metoclopramide
sideEffects: Drowsiness, extrapyramidal symptoms, dystonia, restlessness

name: Cinnarizine
sideEffects: Drowsiness, weight gain, extrapyramidal symptoms, dry mouth

name: Loperamide
sideEffects: Constipation, abdominal cramp, nausea, dizziness
typicalDosage: 4mg initially, then 2mg after each loose stool, max 16mg/day

name: Warfarin Sodium
sideEffects: Bleeding, bruising, skin necrosis (rare), purple toe syndrome

name: Haloperidol
sideEffects: Extrapyramidal symptoms, drowsiness, weight gain, QT prolongation, tardive dyskinesia

name: Ranitidine
sideEffects: Headache, dizziness, diarrhea, constipation, rare: hepatitis

name: Clomiphene Citrate
sideEffects: Hot flashes, abdominal discomfort, ovarian hyperstimulation, visual disturbances
typicalDosage: 50mg daily for 5 days (from day 2-5 of cycle)
